summary: Film Companion MVP - Complete testing completed successfully. All backend APIs (8/8) and frontend flows (12-step onboarding + success screen) passed. TMDB integration, Google Places API, mock authentication, and complete onboarding flow verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: All MongoDB queries correctly exclude _id field using {"_id": 0}
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
React Native components properly used (no HTML elements)
API error handling present and working
Age verification flow correctly validates 18+ requirement
Async/await properly implemented for all DB/API operations
seed_data_creation: Created test users via mock-login during testing: TEST_playwright_user@mock.com, TEST_existing_user@mock.com, test.playwright@mock.com, onboarding.test@mock.com, and several other test users for flow validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete Film Companion MVP tested and verified working. Backend APIs (mock-login, TMDB search, Google Places) all functional. Frontend onboarding flow (12 steps) works end-to-end: Basic Info → Selection Steps (2-8) → Top Movies → Optional Profile → Profile Preview → Mode Selection → Success Screen. Mock auth creates users in MongoDB. Data persists to AsyncStorage. TMDB movie search returns results. Location search via Google Places working. Age verification enforces 18+ requirement. Curtain animation on success screen renders correctly. Known non-breaking warnings: shadow style deprecation, package version mismatches (working despite warnings). All touch targets meet 44px minimum. Dark cinema theme (#121212 bg, #E50914 primary) implemented correctly.
